claims.claim: A premium grain-free cat food with a blend of chicken, turkey, and trout, designed to meet the nutritional needs of cats.
claims.evidence: This premium canned food for cats, known for its balanced nutrition and feast of flavors, ensures your cat gets a diet as yummy as it is healthy.

claims.claim: The formulation philosophy emphasizes high-quality proteins and balanced nutrition for cats.
claims.evidence: Starting with high-quality proteins, this recipe features a succulent blend of chicken, turkey, and trout.
Ingredients: Chicken, Chicken Liver, Chicken Broth...
Ingredients: Chicken, Chicken Liver, Chicken Broth, Turkey, Trout...
Ingredients: Chicken, Chicken Liver, Chicken Broth, Turkey, Trout...

claims.claim: Organic ingredients - Organic chicken plus turkey, liver & shrimp
BPA-free recyclable can - BPA free recyclable can
claims.evidence: Guaranteed Analysis: BPA free recyclable can

claims.claim: Suitable for all life stages of cats.
claims.evidence: Formulated to meet the nutritional levels established by the AAFCO Cat Food Nutrient Profiles for all life stages.

claims.claim: With a soft, pate-style texture, gone are the days of your cat turning their whiskers up at mealtime! Content purrs and clean bowls are guaranteed.
Competitive pricing compared to other brands.
claims.evidence: This comparison has been created by Life's Abundance and is meant to illustrate the differences in pricing between pet food it provides under the mark Life’s Abundance® and those provided by other companies.

claims.claim: Guaranteed Analysis: Crude Protein (min) 12.0%, Crude Fat (min) 7.5%, Crude Fiber (max) 1.0%, Moisture (max) 78.0%, Magnesium (max) 0.04%, Vitamin E (min) 60 IU/kg, Taurine (min) 0.10%, Omega-6 Fatty Acids* (min) 1.20%, Omega-3 Fatty Acids* (min) 0.30% *Not recognized as an essential nutrient by the AAFCO cat food nutrient profiles.
